name: Productized Sprint Offers
next_task: Create Stripe payment links for all three tiers. Build intake form (Google Form or Typeform). Write and test AI pre-analysis prompt against 3 real briefs.
current_focus: Three productized service offers: Speed Fix ($250/24h), Build My Thing ($997/3-5 days), Mini-OS ($2,500-$5,000/7-14 days). No platform required — generates revenue immediately.
completion_checks: Stripe payment links created for Speed Fix ($250), Build My Thing ($997), Mini-OS deposit ($250)
AI pre-analysis prompt tested against 3 real briefs
LinkedIn profile updated to reference sprint offers
First 5 target customers identified from network
anti_drift_notes: No platform required for first revenue. Stripe + intake form + Adam = operational. Platform integration (Command Center panel, auto-routing) is Phase 2 only.

decision_debt.description: Intake form platform choice: Google Form vs Typeform vs custom
Sprint Queue: Notion board as interim vs Command Center panel
